name: A case study on how Synup moved Snappy Tomato Pizza to the HIGHEST locally search pizza restaurant
client_challenge: Snappy Tomato Pizza grew fast and is continuously adding new franchises every year. As they were opening new store locations and across multiple states, they wanted to be able to maintain their brand standards and manage their brand reputation across multiple audiences. As most restaurants who compete in a crowded market, Snappy Tomato Pizza needed to ensure they were providing tools to their franchises to help them manage brand standards, while also extending their brand presence to help them acquire customers in new local markets.
highlight: Snappy Tomato Pizza is a national pizza chain that has grown to more than 50 locations in 5 states by continuously offering their customers the freshest ingredients with amazing customer service.
client_solution:
Snappy Tomato Pizza chose Synup because it provided an all-in-one solution for franchisees to manage all customer reviews in one place, quickly and efficiently while allowing them to effectively manage brand information and marketing presence. Through Synup, Snappy Tomato Pizza could also quickly update holiday hours and special events, push out coupons and other promotions and revise their marketing content that helped drive new customers in their local markets.

‍
customer_stories_card_title: ##Synup helped Snappy Tomato Pizza## become the highest-ranking pizza place in local search

seo.title: A case study on how Synup moved Snappy Tomato Pizza to the HIGHEST locally search pizza restaurant
